# Production-Ready Microservices (Susan J. Fowler)

Before writing, modifying, or planning any code, you MUST use your `read_file` tool to load the relevant guidelines from `.roo/vendor/`. You may read multiple files if the task crosses domains.

## Table of Contents:
    - [Microservices](.roo/vendor/node/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/01-microservices.md): Designing, architecting, evaluating, migrating, or refactoring microservice architectures, including splitting monolithic applications, designing distributed system infrastructure, structuring microservice repositories, defining API endpoints, and establishing organizational engineering standards for distributed systems.
    - [Production-Readiness](.roo/vendor/node/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/02-production-readiness.md): Designing, architecting, auditing, or evaluating microservices to ensure "production-readiness" and high availability before handling live production traffic.
    - [Stability and Reliability](.roo/vendor/node/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/03-stability-and-reliability.md): Tasks related to microservice architecture, continuous integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines, dependency management, routing and service discovery configuration, or the deprecation and decommissioning of microservices and API endpoints.
    - [Scalability and Performance](.roo/vendor/node/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/04-scalability-and-performance.md): The architectural design, refactoring, performance tuning, capacity planning, database selection, or infrastructure configuration of microservices, specifically focusing on scalability, handling increased traffic, optimizing task processing, and reducing latency.
    - [Fault Tolerance and Catastrophe-Preparedness](.roo/vendor/node/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/05-fault-tolerance-and-catastrophe-preparedness.md): Designing system architecture, reviewing or writing microservice code, configuring deployment pipelines, building testing suites (unit, integration, end-to-end, load, chaos), setting up monitoring/remediation automation, and generating incident response documentation/postmortems.
    - [Monitoring](.roo/vendor/node/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/06-monitoring.md): Designing, implementing, configuring, reviewing, or debugging observability, logging, dashboarding, alerting, or on-call runbook systems for microservices, including application code instrumentation, infrastructure-as-code for monitoring tools, log formatting, alert rule definitions, and the creation of operational documentation.
    - [Documentation and Understanding](.roo/vendor/node/production-ready-microservices-susan-j-fowler/07-documentation-and-understanding.md): Generating, reviewing, or updating documentation for a microservice, performing architecture reviews, conducting production-readiness audits, or generating on-call runbooks.
